events.title: Chess Club Open Tournament
events.description: Open tournament for all skill levels. Come challenge your mind and meet fellow chess enthusiasts. Bring your own clock if you have one.

events.title: Women's Basketball vs. Hunter
events.description: Come cheer on the Lady Bulldogs as they take on Hunter College in a crucial conference matchup. Free admission for all students with valid ID.

events.title: Open Mic Night
events.description: Bring your voice, your poetry, your instrument, or just your ears. All are welcome on and off the stage. Sign up at the door or just come listen.

events.title: Pre-Law Society Info Session
events.description: Thinking about law school? Hear from upperclassmen and alumni about the LSAT, applications, and what law school is really like. Light refreshments provided.

events.title: Spring Jazz Showcase
events.description: The Brooklyn College Jazz Ensemble presents their spring showcase featuring original compositions and jazz standards. A night you won't want to miss.

events.title: Environmental Club Tabling
events.description: Stop by our table to learn about upcoming sustainability initiatives on campus, sign petitions, and grab some free seeds to plant at home.

events.title: Men's Soccer vs. Lehman
events.description: The Bulldogs face off against Lehman College in what promises to be a competitive midweek match. Show up and make some noise for your team.

events.title: Film Screening: Metropolis
events.description: Restored 4K screening of Fritz Lang's 1927 masterpiece with live musical accompaniment. Discussion to follow. Free popcorn while supplies last.

events.title: Coding Workshop: Intro to Python
events.description: Learn the basics of Python in this hands-on beginner workshop. No experience needed — bring a laptop or use a lab computer. Snacks provided.

events.title: Step Team Practice & Showcase
events.description: Watch the step team run through their latest routines, and if you're interested in joining, this is the perfect chance to see what we're about.

events.title: Intramural Volleyball Sign-Ups
events.description: Sign up for the spring intramural volleyball league. Teams of 6. Open to all students, faculty, and staff. Season runs April through May.

events.title: Black Student Union Mixer
events.description: Network with fellow students, faculty mentors, and community members at our spring mixer. Food will be provided. All are welcome.

events.title: Improv Comedy Night
events.description: Come laugh with us. Our improv troupe performs short-form games and long-form scenes — all made up on the spot. Shows are always free.

events.title: Study Abroad Info Fair
events.description: Explore study abroad opportunities in over 30 countries. Meet program representatives, talk to returning students, and learn about scholarships and financial aid.

events.title: Spring Choral Concert
events.description: The Brooklyn College Chorus presents their spring concert featuring choral works from Brahms, Whitacre, and original student compositions. Doors open at 6:00 PM.
